description_long: This is a realistic adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms relaxed at his sides. The figure is bald, with defined facial features and a neutral expression. He is wearing fitted, mid-thigh length shorts that appear to be made of a synthetic or athletic material. The skin tone is even, and the musculature is well-defined, especially in the chest, arms, and legs. The feet are bare, and the hands are open with fingers slightly curved. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, athletic individual suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or gyms.
description: A bald, athletic adult male standing upright in fitted shorts with bare feet and defined musculature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, abdominal muscles, and the front of the shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, chest, arm, and leg muscles.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the broad shoulders, back muscles, and the rear of the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg, similar to the left side.
